final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for GPT-5.5 domestic financing announcement, featuring Sam Altman as speaker, designed for Chinese venture capital roadshow presentation.

Style/medium: Chinese tech startup pitch deck aesthetic, clean corporate design with subtle gradient backgrounds, professional business presentation style
Composition: centered layout with speaker portrait on left, bold headline on right, generous whitespace, 16:9 presentation slide format
Subject: Sam Altman portrait in business attire, confident expression, clean headshot style
Scene/backdrop: abstract tech-inspired gradient background (deep blue to purple), subtle circuit or neural network pattern overlay, minimal decorative elements
Lighting/mood: soft studio lighting on portrait, professional and authoritative mood, aspirational and forward-looking tone
Color palette: deep tech blue as primary, electric purple as secondary, white text for contrast, gold or orange accent for "GPT-5.5" highlight
Text (verbatim): "GPT5.5发布"
Constraints: must work as PowerPoint cover slide; text must be legible from 10 meters; suitable for VC/PE audience in China
Avoid: cluttered layout; cartoonish illustrations; overly flashy gradients; Western-centric design tropes; watermark; decorative frames that reduce readability
